notes: This file is owned by Agent 08 only.
Structure nests rounds inside sprints to keep history organized.

sprint_meta.notes: Sprint wk15 UX Polish & Pacing. Agent 08: 15A UI Polish & Overhaul.

wk15_r1_15a_ui_polish.prompt_text: Execute 15A: Pause menu spacing/icons; left panel 30% slimmer; right menu vanish when nothing selected; Research progress bar when research active.

what_i_changed: game/ui/pause_menu.py: Added icon_map entries for resume (icon_play.png) and quit (icon_quit.png); reduced button_y 70->56, button_h 40->34, spacing 44->32.

game/ui/hud.py: Left panel width 320->224 (30% slimmer). Right panel: only show when right_panel_visible AND (selected_building or micro_view != OVERVIEW); _show_right_panel set in render(); right panel and content not rendered when nothing selected.

game/ui/building_renderers/economic_panel.py: Marketplace Research: when building.research_in_progress and research_progress < 1.0, show 'Researching potions...' label + HPBar progress bar; else show existing Research button. Reads optional research_in_progress/research_progress for Agent 06 timed research.
how_to_test: python main.py --no-llm: ESC -> Pause menu has tighter buttons, Resume/Quit show icons if assets exist.
Left panel: select hero/building -> panel is 224px wide.
Deselect all, Tab on -> right panel stays hidden until building selected or interior/quest view.
Select Marketplace (no research): Research button. When Agent 06 adds research_in_progress/research_progress, progress bar shows during research.

evidence.qa_smoke: python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick exit_code=1 (FAIL from Agent 06: basic_ai calls defend_economic_building_warrior not yet in ai.behaviors.defense; speed_scaling 0.1x profile failed). Determinism PASS, pytest 81 passed, base/bounty/stuck/no-enemies/mock-LLM profiles PASS.

blockers: QA gate FAIL is pre-existing: Agent 06 15C defense method and speed_scaling profile; no UI code in failure path.

sprint_meta.notes: Sprint wk16 UX & Interactions. Agent 08: 16A Menu Alignment & Hero Selection Contexts.

wk16_r1_16a_menu_and_hero_selection.prompt_text: 16A: Pause menu alignment (blank icon for resume/quit when missing); hero global selection from interior click and chat header click -> selected_hero, left panel.

what_i_changed: game/ui/pause_menu.py: When icon_play.png/icon_quit.png fail to load, use pygame.Surface((16,16), SRCALPHA) for resume/quit in _icon_map so Button layout aligns all 5 main menu buttons.

game/input_handler.py: On start_conversation dict set engine.selected_hero = hero, engine.selected_building = None so left panel shows hero when clicking hero in interior. On select_hero dict set selected_hero and selected_building = None (chat header click).
game/ui/chat_panel.py: Store _header_rect in render(); handle_click returns {"type": "select_hero", "hero": hero_target} when click on header (portrait/name). Return type str | dict | None.
how_to_test: ESC -> Pause menu: Resume and Quit buttons align with Graphics/Audio/Controls (same icon slot width).
Enter building, click a hero: left panel shows that hero; conversation can start as before.
In chat with a hero, click the header (name/portrait): left panel shows that hero's details.

sprint_meta.notes: WK17: Quality, Logic, & Immersion. Agent 08: Peasant selection + info panel.

what_i_changed: game/engine.py: selected_peasant; try_select_peasant(screen_pos); clear selected_peasant in try_select_hero/tc/guard/building and on empty click; game_state['selected_peasant'].
game/input_handler.py: try_select_peasant in selection chain (after guard, before building); clear selected_peasant on hero/tc/guard/empty; close_selection clears selected_peasant.
game/ui/hud.py: _peasant_action_label(peasant), _render_peasant_summary(surface, peasant, left_rect); left panel shows peasant panel when selected_peasant set (title Peasant, Action, HP bar).
how_to_test: Run game, wait for peasants to spawn. Click a peasant: left panel shows 'Peasant' with Action (e.g. Building (Farm), Repairing (Market), Resting in castle, Walking) and HP bar.
Click hero/building/empty: peasant selection clears. Click peasant again: panel displays.

sprint_meta.notes: WK18: LLM-AI Merger, Physicality, & Dev Tools. Agent 08: Dev Tools Overlay UI.

what_i_changed: game/events.py: GameEventType.LLM_REQUEST, LLM_RESPONSE for Agent 12 data tap.
game/ui/dev_tools_panel.py: DevToolsPanel subscribes to llm_request/llm_response, shows scrolling color-coded log (request=blue, response=green, error=red), F4 toggle.
game/engine.py: create dev_tools_panel with event_bus; render after debug_panel.
game/input_handler.py: F4 toggles dev_tools_panel; handle_click consumes clicks inside panel.
game/display_manager.py: dev_tools_panel.on_resize on display change.
game/ui/__init__.py: export DevToolsPanel.
how_to_test: Run game, press F4: Dev Tools overlay appears (bottom-right) with title 'AI/LLM Log (F4 to close)'. Press F4 again to close.
When Agent 12 wires data tap: events llm_request/llm_response will stream into the panel with color-coding.

sprint_meta.notes: WK20 R2: Ursina mouse → fixed 1080p virtual engine.screen

what_i_changed: game/ursina_input_manager.py: Implemented get_mouse_pos() — inverse of Ursina mouse.Mouse (window.aspect_ratio, window.size), then linear scale to virtual framebuffer (default 1920×1080 per PM). Optional constructor virtual_screen_size=(1920,1080).
Constants: _DEFAULT_VIRTUAL_SCREEN aligned with GameEngine headless_ui surface.
how_to_test: Run Ursina viewer; move cursor to corners — HUD hit tests should align with stretched camera.ui quad (manual).
With KINGDOM_URSINA_DEBUG_INPUT=1 (Agent 12), verify printed coords vs expected virtual pixels.

sprint_meta.notes: WK22 R1: SPRINT-BUG-004 hotkeys in Ursina

what_i_changed: game/ursina_input_manager.py: Added ursina_key_to_input_event() — maps Ursina input() strings to KEYDOWN/WHEEL (matches PygameInputManager generic keys); extended _URSINA_KEY_MAP for esc/space/tab/symbols.
game/graphics/ursina_app.py: _handle_ursina_input no longer drops all keys after F12/LMB; queues converted events so tick_simulation → process_events → handle_keydown receives hotkeys.
how_to_test: python main.py --renderer ursina — press 1–8, h, b, esc, tab, f3, mouse wheel zoom — should match pygame behavior.
blockers: Chat typing in Ursina still expects pygame raw_event on KEYDOWN; not fixed in this ticket.

round_meta.build_target: WK22 R3 Ursina HUD crisp + bounty click

what_i_changed: game/graphics/ursina_app.py: _force_nearest_texture_filter on HUD composite Texture (filtering=None); pointer routing treats HUD layout chrome as UI so low-alpha pixels (icons) still get virtual 1920×1080 coords; sync engine._last_ui_cursor_pos from Ursina mouse before render_pygame.
game/ui/hud.py: _layout_rects_for_screen + virtual_pointer_in_hud_chrome(); CommandBar/SpeedBar use game_state ui_cursor_pos.
game/ui/command_bar.py: render(..., mouse_pos=) for Ursina (pygame.mouse dummy).
game/engine.py + game/input_handler.py: _last_ui_cursor_pos + get_game_state ui_cursor_pos; handle_mousemove updates cursor.
how_to_test: python main.py --renderer ursina — HUD text/icons should look sharp (nearest-neighbor), Bounty command button click should place bounty / match hotkey B.
python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick

round_meta.build_target: WK22 R3 PM: resize pygame HUD to Ursina window — native font raster

what_i_changed: game/display_manager.py: DisplayManager.apply_headless_ui_canvas_size(engine,w,h) — recreates engine.screen/_scaled_surface/_pause_overlay, HUD + panels on_resize, building_panel/debug_panel dimensions, clamp_camera; no pygame.display.set_mode (SDL dummy).

game/graphics/ursina_app.py: _sync_headless_ui_canvas_to_window() each frame from window.size; UrsinaInputManager.set_virtual_screen_size; invalidate HUD GPU texture when dimensions change; _hud_prefers_nearest_pixel_filter always True (1:1 texels).
game/ursina_input_manager.py: set_virtual_screen_size().
how_to_test: python main.py --renderer ursina — drag window corner; HUD should re-layout at new pixel size (not stretched 1080p).
python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick

what_i_changed: game/input_handler.py: _clear_hero_selection — chat end, engine.micro_view.exit_hero_focus(), then selected_hero=None; ESC in HERO_FOCUS matches that order.
game/ui/hud.py: chat_panel hit-testing in HERO_FOCUS uses bottom-half rect (matches render); exit_hero_focus from micro_view maps to end_conversation.
game/ui/pause_menu.py: Controls column uses chat_panel._wrap_text; audio uses Slider.hit_test_interactive; Graphics page Ursina note; render(..., mouse_pos) for virtual UI cursor.
game/ui/widgets.py: Slider.hit_test_interactive (track + thumb, vertical padding).
game/engine.py: pause_menu.render passes get_game_state ui_cursor_pos when available.
how_to_test: python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick
python main.py --renderer ursina --provider mock

what_i_changed: game/ui/pause_menu.py: Removed Unicode ►/■ from Resume/Quit labels (default pygame font → tofu in Ursina HUD); labels are plain "Resume" / "Quit" (icons unchanged).

game/ui/pause_menu.py: While visible and engine._ursina_viewer, set engine._ursina_hud_force_upload so row-sampled HUD CRC cannot skip GPU upload when only upper modal rows change (fixes missing hover highlight on first menu buttons).
how_to_test: python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick
python main.py --renderer ursina --provider mock — open ESC menu; hover Resume and Graphics; both should use hover texture like Audio; Resume text has no junk glyph before "Resume".
